_meta.description: Dexcost Service Catalog — per-request pricing for non-LLM services commonly used by AI agents. Community-maintained, open-source. Submit PRs to add new services.

how_cost_is_extracted.response_body: Read a field from the JSON response body (e.g. credits_used)
how_cost_is_extracted.response_header: Read a value from a response header (e.g. X-Credits-Spent)
how_cost_is_extracted.endpoint_match: Fixed cost per request, matched by URL path
how_cost_is_extracted.fixed: Fixed cost per request regardless of endpoint

cost_extraction.note: Credits field in response body unverified. Using 1 credit per request default.

perplexity_search.note: Search API flat rate. Sonar models use token-based pricing.

bing_search.note: Bing Web Search v7. $7/25K transactions (S1 tier).

browserbase.note: $0.10-0.12/hr overage. Billed minimum 1 minute per session.

scrapingbee.note: JS rendering uses 5 credits by default

apify.note: 1 CU = 1 GB-RAM x 1 hour. Scale plan: $0.25/CU.

scrapingdog.note: PAYG: $10/25K credits. JS rendering uses 5 credits. Google Search API uses 5 credits.

jina_reader.note: Token-based pricing. Free 10M tokens per API key. Tracked for call counting.

weaviate_cloud.note: Subscription-based (Flex $45/mo). Tracked for call counting only.

qdrant_cloud.note: Resource-based pricing. Tracked for call counting only.

milvus_zilliz.note: CU-based pricing. Tracked for call counting only.

astra_db.note: Read/write unit pricing. Tracked for call counting only.

aws_lambda.note: Varies by memory allocation and region.

twilio_sms.note: US domestic. International rates vary by destination.

hunter_io.note: Business plan: $199/10K searches. Starter: $0.098/search. Uses credit system.

stripe_payment.note: 2.9% + $0.30 per successful card charge. Actual fee varies by card type and country.

eleven_labs.note: $0.06/1K chars for Flash/Turbo models. $0.12/1K for Multilingual v2/v3.

assemblyai.note: Add-on features (diarization, PII, etc.) cost extra.

openai_dalle.note: Price varies by model, size, quality

stability_ai.note: Per credit, 1 credit = 1 generation on SD3

replicate.note: Billed per second of hardware time. Rate varies by hardware (T4/A40/A100).

polygon_io.note: Monthly subscription ($29-199/mo). Tracked for call counting only.

aws_s3.note: GET request price. PUT is $0.000005. Varies by region and storage class.

supabase.note: Supabase pricing is per-project (subscription), not per-request. Tracked for call counting only.

deepl_translate.note: API Pro: $25/1M chars + $5.49/mo base. Free tier: 500K chars/mo.

aws_translate.note: Standard: $15/1M chars. Free tier: 2M chars/mo for 12 months.

azure_translator.note: S1 tier: $10/1M chars. Free tier: 2M chars/mo.

google_vision.note: OCR/text detection: $1.50/1K images. Label detection: $1.50/1K. First 1K/mo free.

azure_computer_vision.note: S1: ~$1/1K transactions for image analysis. OCR similar. Free: 5K/mo.

aws_rekognition.note: Label detection: $1/1K images (first 1M/mo). Face detection same. Free: 5K/mo for 12 months.

runway_video.note: Gen-3 Alpha: 10 credits/sec at ~$0.01/credit = $0.10/sec for 10s video. Gen-3 Turbo: 5 credits/sec.

heygen_video.note: Credit-based. 1 credit ~= 1 second of video. Plans from $24/mo.

luma_video.note: API: $0.032/generation (5s clip). Plans from $23.99/mo for 150 generations.

mux_video.note: Delivery: ~$0.04/min (1080p). Encoding: $0.015/min. Storage: $0.003/min. 100K delivery mins free/mo.

slack_api.note: API is free with workspace subscription ($7.25-$12.50/user/mo). Tracked for call counting.

discord_api.note: Free API. Rate limited. Tracked for call counting only.

telegram_api.note: Free API. Tracked for call counting only.

twilio_voice.note: Outbound US: $0.014/min. Inbound: $0.0085/min. Rates vary by country.

onesignal.note: Free unlimited push notifications. Paid plans by MAU ($0.012/mobile MAU on Growth). Tracked for call counting.

pusher.note: Free: 200K messages/day. Paid plans from $49/mo. Tracked for call counting.

planetscale.note: Scaler Pro: $39/mo base. Reads: $1.50/billion. Writes: $1.50/million. Tracked for call counting.

turso_db.note: Scaler: $29/mo for 25B row reads. Free: 9GB storage + 500 DBs. Tracked for call counting.

mongodb_atlas.note: Serverless: $0.10/million reads + $1.00/million writes. Shared free tier available. Tracked for call counting.

fauna_db.note: Reads: $0.45/million. Writes: $2.03/million. Compute: $0.18/million TROs. Free tier available. Tracked for call counting.

cockroachdb.note: Basic: $0.20/million RUs. Free: 50M RUs/mo. Tracked for call counting.

auth0.note: B2C Essentials: $35/mo for 500 MAU ($0.07/MAU overage). Free: 25K MAU. Tracked for call counting.

clerk_auth.note: Pro: $25/mo + $0.02/MAU above 10K. Free: 10K MAU. Tracked for call counting.

firebase_auth.note: Free: 50K MAU. Phone auth: $0.01-0.06/verification. Tracked for call counting.

workos.note: AuthKit free up to 1M MAU. SSO: $125/mo per connection. Tracked for call counting.

cloudinary.note: 1 credit = 1K transformations or 1GB storage or 1GB bandwidth. Overage: ~$0.37/credit. Free: 25 credits/mo.

imgix.note: Rendering: from $5/1K master images. Bandwidth extra. Tracked for call counting.

uploadthing.note: Free: 2GB storage. Pro: $10/mo for 100GB. Tracked for call counting.

sentry.note: Team: $29/mo for 50K events. Business: $89/mo for 100K. Dev free: 5K events. Tracked for call counting.

datadog.note: Logs: $0.10/GB ingested. APM: $31/host/mo. Infra: $15/host/mo. Tracked for call counting.

posthog.note: Product analytics: Free 1M events/mo, then $0.00031/event. Tracked for call counting.

mixpanel.note: Growth: $28/mo for 10K MTU. Free: 20M events/mo. Tracked for call counting.

segment.note: Free: 1K visitors/mo. Team: $120/mo for 10K MTU. Tracked for call counting.

huggingface_inference.note: Pay per second of compute. Rate depends on hardware (GPU/CPU). Endpoints from $0.03/hr.

scale_ai.note: Data labeling from $0.08/task. Enterprise pricing. Volume discounts.

together_ai.note: Per-token pricing varies by model. Llama 3 70B: $0.88/1M tokens. Mixtral: $0.60/1M. Tracked for call counting.

groq_inference.note: Per-token pricing varies by model. Llama 3 70B: $0.59/1M input. Free tier available. Tracked for call counting.

fireworks_ai.note: Per-token pricing. Llama 3 70B: $0.90/1M tokens. Serverless or dedicated. Tracked for call counting.

zapier.note: Pro: starts $29.99/mo for 750 tasks (~$0.04/task). Team: $103.50/mo for 2K tasks. Pay-per-task available.

make_integromat.note: Core: $10.59/mo for 10K ops. Pro: $18.82/mo for 10K ops. Free: 1K ops/mo.

paypal.note: 3.49% + $0.49 per transaction (online). Rates vary by type and region.

razorpay.note: Standard: 2% per transaction (India). International: 3%. No setup fee.

shopify_api.note: API free with plan subscription ($29-$399/mo). Rate limited: 2-20 req/sec. Tracked for call counting.

twitter_api.note: Free: 1.5K posts write/mo. Basic: $100/mo for 10K reads. Pro: $5K/mo. Tracked for call counting.

linkedin_api.note: Free with developer app. Rate limited. Premium APIs require partnership. Tracked for call counting.

reddit_api.note: Free: 100 req/min (OAuth). Tracked for call counting.

youtube_data_api.note: Free: 10K units/day. Most reads cost 1 unit. Search costs 100 units. Tracked for call counting.

openweathermap.note: One Call 3.0: 1K calls/day free, then $0.15/100 calls. Other APIs: Free 60 calls/min.

weatherapi.note: Free: 1M calls/mo. Pro: $9/mo for 2M. Tracked for call counting.

newsapi.note: Business: $449/mo for 250K req. Developer: free 100 req/day.

ipinfo.note: Basic: $99/mo for 250K req = $0.0004/req. Free: 50K/mo. Business: $249/mo for 1M.

maxmind_geoip.note: GeoIP2 Web: $0.10/1K queries. Free GeoLite2 DB downloads available.

redis_cloud.note: Fixed: from $5/mo for 250MB. Free: 30MB. Per-operation pricing not applicable. Tracked for call counting.

github_api.note: Free API. Rate limited: 5K req/hr (authenticated). Tracked for call counting.

gitlab_api.note: Free with GitLab account. Rate limited. Tracked for call counting.

sonarcloud.note: Free for public repos. Private: from $10/mo for 100K LoC. Tracked for call counting.

snyk.note: Free: 200 tests/mo. Team: $25/dev/mo. Tracked for call counting.

vercel_api.note: Free: 100GB bandwidth. Pro: $20/user/mo. Tracked for call counting.

docusign.note: API starter: $600/yr. Metered overages: $0.10-$2.00/envelope depending on plan.

calendly_api.note: API free with plan ($10-$16/user/mo). Rate limited. Tracked for call counting.

jira_api.note: API free with subscription ($7-$12/user/mo). Rate limited. Tracked for call counting.

linear_api.note: API free with plan (Free for small teams, $8/user/mo Plus). Tracked for call counting.

asana_api.note: API free with subscription ($10.99-$24.99/user/mo). Rate limited: 1.5K/min. Tracked for call counting.

clickup_api.note: API free with plan ($7-$12/user/mo). Rate limited: 100 req/min. Tracked for call counting.

notion_api.note: API free with plan ($8-$15/user/mo). Rate limited: 3 req/sec. Tracked for call counting.

salesforce_api.note: API included in subscription ($25-$500/user/mo). Daily limits by edition (15K-100K calls). Tracked for call counting.

hubspot_api.note: API free with subscription. Rate limited: 100-200 req/10sec. Tracked for call counting.

scraperapi.note: Hobby: $49/mo for ~5.8K credits. 1 credit = 1 successful request. JS rendering uses 10 credits.

zenrows.note: Basic: $0.28/1K req. JS rendering: $0.50/1K. Premium proxy: $1.00/1K. Business plan.

oxylabs_scraper.note: Micro: $49/mo for 25K results ($0.002/result). JS rendering uses more.

resemble_ai.note: API: $0.006/sec of generated audio (~$0.36/min). Plans from $30/mo.

playht.note: Pro: $31.20/mo for unlimited chars. API: ~$0.03/1K chars on Creator plan.

you_search.note: Web Search: $0.005/req. News: $0.005/req. RAG: $0.005/req. Free tier available.

midjourney_api.note: Estimated: Basic $10/mo for ~200 images. No official API yet — proxied services available.

leonardo_ai.note: API: ~$0.006-$0.012/image depending on model. Apprentice: $12/mo for 8.5K tokens.

chroma_cloud.note: Cloud: from $30/mo. Open source self-hosted is free. Tracked for call counting.

turbopuffer.note: Pay-per-use: $0.2/million vectors stored/mo, $0.04/1K queries. Tracked for call counting.

fly_machines.note: shared-cpu-1x: $0.0000058/sec (~$1.94/mo). Billed per second when running.

cloudflare_workers.note: Paid: $5/mo includes 10M requests, then $0.50/million. Free: 100K requests/day.

docraptor.note: Growth: $29/mo for 1.25K docs. Test documents always free.

browserless.note: Usage: ~$0.01-0.02/browser session. Free: 6 hrs/mo. Plans from $200/mo.

tavily_extract.note: Extract API: 5 credits/request (vs 1 for search). $0.04/extraction at $0.008/credit.

gcs.note: Class A ops (write): $0.005/1K. Class B ops (read): $0.004/10K. Storage: $0.020/GB-mo.

azure_blob.note: Hot: Write $0.065/10K ops, Read $0.005/10K ops. Storage: $0.018/GB-mo.

r2_cloudflare.note: Class A (write): $4.50/million. Class B (read): $0.36/million. Zero egress fees. Free: 10M reads/mo.

apollo_io.note: Basic: $49/mo for 900 credits. 1 credit = 1 email/phone lookup. Free: 10K credits/yr.

zoominfo_api.note: Enterprise pricing from ~$15K/yr. Estimated $0.10/credit. Volume discounts.
